basic_info.name: Haikou Fuxing City Wavegarden Cove (海口復興城 Wavegarden Cove) - NOT VERIFIED. No public record - Chinese or international - confirms the existence, construction, or formal announcement of a Wavegarden Cove facility at Haikou Fuxing City as of 2026-05. The original entry appears to conflate the Wavegarden brand with the only operating Hainan wave pool, SURFLAND, which uses American Wave Machines' PerfectSwell technology and is located in Wanning (not Haikou) at Riyue Bay. Fuxing City itself is a digital-economy industrial park, not a leisure or beach destination.
basic_info.location: Allegedly inside or adjacent to Haikou Fuxing City (复兴城). Fuxing City has two campuses: Zone 1 'Fuxing City Internet Innovation Base' (78.6 mu / ~80,000㎡ GFA) at the intersection of Wanlu Park (万绿园), Century Park (世纪公园) and Binhai Park (滨海公园) in Longhua District; Zone 2 'Fuxing City International Digital Port' (256.8 mu / ~900,000㎡ GFA, planned investment ~RMB 10 billion) in the West Coast South District. Both are office / digital-economy parks with no wave-pool component.
basic_info.operator: [uncertain] - No operator identified. No company has been linked to a Wavegarden Cove project at Fuxing City. Fuxing City itself is co-developed under Hainan's 'province + municipality + district + private enterprise' model (Fullsing Group / 复星城产业发展) but no wave-tech licensee has been announced.
basic_info.opening_date: [uncertain] - No opening date because no project is confirmed. WavePoolMag's '2026 New Wave Pools' worldwide list contains no Chinese facility for 2026.

technical_specs.wave_technology_brand: [uncertain] - Wavegarden Cove is referenced in the original entry but Wavegarden's official 2026 'Six new world-class surf destinations' announcement names DSRT Surf (USA), El Nido (Uruguay), Surfers Cove (Portugal), Gemswell Surf Madrid (Spain), Perth Surf Park (Australia), Auckland Surf Park (NZ) - no Chinese / Hainan / Haikou project. Wavegarden has 'more than 50 committed developments worldwide' but no announced Hainan deployment. The only operating Hainan wave pool is SURFLAND, which uses PerfectSwell (American Wave Machines), not Wavegarden Cove.

surroundings.nearby_accommodation: [uncertain] - Not applicable to a non-existent wave pool. For reference, Fuxing City Zone 1 sits in Haikou's Binhai commercial belt near Wanlu Park; nearby hotels include Crowne Plaza Haikou Lucky Mansion, Howard Johnson Hotel, and various business hotels (price range 400-1500 RMB/night).
surroundings.on_site_accommodation: [uncertain] - Not applicable; no on-site accommodation exists because no wave pool exists. Fuxing City is an office park with no resort/hotel of its own.
surroundings.nearby_food: [uncertain] - Not applicable to a non-existent wave pool. Fuxing City Zone 1 is surrounded by Binhai-area office canteens, cafes and Hainanese restaurants.
surroundings.transport: [uncertain] - Not applicable. Fuxing City Zone 1 is reachable via city bus, didi/taxi, and the future Haikou Metro; located between Wanlu Park, Century Park and Binhai Park.
surroundings.transport_to_nearest_airport: [uncertain] - Not applicable. For reference, Fuxing City Zone 1 is roughly 22 km / 35-45 minutes by car from Haikou Meilan International Airport (HAK).
surroundings.combined_itinerary: [uncertain] - Not applicable; the only operating Hainan artificial wave pool (SURFLAND PerfectSwell at Wanning Riyue Bay) is the genuine surf destination for visitors based in Haikou (~2 hours by car / 60 km).

reviews_reputation.user_reviews: [uncertain] - No user reviews exist on Xiaohongshu, Mafengwo, Dianping, Ctrip, or Trip.com for any 'Wavegarden Cove' or surf pool at Haikou Fuxing City.
reviews_reputation.recommended_for: [uncertain] - Not applicable; project does not exist.
reviews_reputation.operator_brand_partnership: [uncertain] - No partnerships announced. Fuxing City's actual tenant base is digital-economy companies (Alibaba, ByteDance, Xiaomi, Schneider, Tesla) - no wave-tech licensee.

verification.verification_sources: Verification searches conducted 2026-05-15 found no public record of a Wavegarden Cove facility at Haikou Fuxing City. Sources consulted: (1) Baidu Baike entry for 'Haikou Fuxing City Internet Information Industrial Park' confirms it is one of Hainan FTP's 11 key industrial parks, focused on digital economy with four vertical clusters - smart IoT, digital trade, fintech, offshore innovation - and tenants Alibaba, ByteDance, Xiaomi, Schneider, Tesla; no surf / wave-pool / leisure component is listed: https://baike.baidu.com/item/海口复兴城互联网信息产业园/56316328 ; (2) Fuxing City official site park-introduction page describes Zone 1 (78.6 mu / 80,000㎡) and Zone 2 (256.8 mu / ~900,000㎡, ~RMB 10B planned investment) as office and digital-economy infrastructure: http://wap.fullsing.cn/index.php?c=category&id=105 ; (3) Jiemian (界面新闻) feature on Fuxing City's four vertical industry clusters and FTP positioning - no aquatic-leisure mention: https://www.jiemian.com/article/4172318.html ; (4) The Paper 'Haikou Fuxing City 2.0' coverage describes Zone 2 expansion as digital industry hub - no wave pool: https://m.thepaper.cn/newsDetail_forward_15598142 ; (5) The Paper 'towards trillion-yuan digital economy cluster' coverage on Fuxing City - again purely tech / digital, no surf: https://m.thepaper.cn/newsDetail_forward_16898883 ; (6) 21Jingji on Fuxing City Cross-Border Data Service Industry Base - tech/data focus only: https://www.21jingji.com/article/20240822/herald/5046b756cf3aa608344b3a90a2d4c4ca.html ; (7) Wavegarden's official 2026 'Six new world-class surf destinations' announcement names DSRT Surf USA, El Nido Uruguay, Surfers Cove Portugal, Gemswell Surf Madrid Spain, Perth Surf Park Australia, Auckland Surf Park NZ - no Chinese / Hainan project: https://amusementtoday.com/2026/04/6-new-wavegarden-world-class-surf-destinations-on-the-horizon/ ; (8) Wavegarden corporate site (https://wavegarden.com/) carries no Hainan press release as of 2026-05; (9) WavePoolMag 'New Wave Pools 2026' index lists every wave pool opening worldwide in 2026 - no Chinese facility appears: https://wavepoolmag.com/new-wave-pools-2026/ ; (10) The only confirmed operational artificial wave pool in Hainan as of 2026-05 is SURFLAND at Wanning Riyue Bay, using PerfectSwell technology (NOT Wavegarden Cove) - this is the project the entry is most likely confused with. Sources: TropicalHainan https://www.tropicalhainan.com/chinas-first-olympic-standard-wave-pool-opens-in-wanning-hainan/ , Wavepool Mag https://wavepoolmag.com/wave-pool-china-perfectswell-hainan/ , Korea Herald https://www.koreaherald.com/article/10623347 , Surfway Hainan official https://surfway-hainan.com/. SURFLAND is in Wanning, ~60 km from Haikou. Conclusion: as of 2026-05-15 no Wavegarden Cove facility exists, is under construction, or has been formally announced at Haikou Fuxing City. The original entry appears to conflate Wavegarden with the PerfectSwell SURFLAND project in Wanning and incorrectly assigns it to the Fuxing City digital-economy park in Haikou.
